title: Senior Purchaser
description:
Senior Purchaser - Serangoon (ML) / Kaki Bukit (SG)

Main Responsibilities

  • Handle daily purchasing tasks: follow up on POs, coordinate delivery schedules, issue costing instructions, and manage supplier quotations.
  • Communicate with suppliers via phone and email.
  • Maintain accurate purchasing records and documentation.
  • Prepare weekly reports (PO status, open PO list, cost-saving updates).
  • Build strong supplier relationships and ensure reliable sourcing.
  • Manage subcontracting and vendor coordination.
  • Support cross-department operational needs.
  • Conduct sourcing to identify and evaluate new suppliers.
  • Provide team backup support when required.

Requirements

  • Diploma holder with 3–4 years of relevant experience.
  • Strong communication and negotiation skills.
  • Experience in procurement or supply chain.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel (data analysis & formulas).
  • Detail-oriented, motivated, and target-driven.
  • Good in sourcing and supplier evaluation.
  • Knowledge of ISO standards is an advantage


For interested applicants, kindly send your resume in Word/PDF format to include the following in your resume including:

1. Current Salary

2. Expected Salary

3. Availability

4. Reason for leaving

Thank you for your application and we regret that only shortlisted applicants will be notified

By submitting any application or resume to us, you will be deemed to have agreed & consented to us collecting, using, retaining & disclosing your personal information to prospective employers with the services provided by us.

Nguyen Thi Doan | R23116355

RRecruiter Pte. Ltd. | 18C9514

Our timely action plan significantly saves client’s time and costs.

Our passion is to deliver outstanding customer service to the companies and candidates that we partner. Developing long term and mutually beneficial relationships is the key to our success.
